mapper.select:
SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE 1=1
AND t2.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND t2.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{localName} || '%'
AND t1.ADDRESS_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{addressContent} || '%'
AND t1.ACTIVITY = '1' ORDER BY t1.PERSON_ID ASC

SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE t1.ACTIVITY = '1' AND t1.ADDRESS_NO = #{addressNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_ADDRESS_MATTERS SET PERSON_ID = #{personId}, ADDRESS_TYPE = #{addressType}, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = #{effectiveStartDate}, ADDRESS_CONTENT = #{addressContent}, ACTIVITY = 1, NATIONALITY = #{nationality}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE ADDRESS_NO = #{addressNo}
